title: Outbox Event Envelope
description: Wrapper around every event published by posting-manager. The shape of `payload` depends on `eventType` and is defined by a sibling schema.

eventId.description: Monotonic id assigned by the outbox table. Stable across retries; use for dedup within a single producer instance.

aggregateId.description: Posting UUID. Same value for the transaction event and both balance events from one posting.

partitionKey.description: correlationId — used as the Kafka message key. All events sharing this key land in the same partition and are observed in publish order.

createdAt.description: When the outbox row was written (DB tx commit time). Always present.

payload.description: Domain payload — see posting-transaction-applied.schema.json or account-balance-changed.schema.json depending on eventType.
